title: Food Stamps/SNAP Fraud Reporting - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Food > Food Stamps/SNAP Fraud Reporting 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES ODHS FRAUD INVESTIGATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Conducts investigations related to allegations of fraud within programs administered by ODHS. Investigations focus on client eligibility issues as well as fraud allegations made against ODHS providers and contractors. Client benefits fraud: Report suspected client fraud related to state benefits (Oregon Health Plan, EBT cards, food, cash or child care benefits) Provider fraud: Report suspected provider fraud related to the Oregon Health Plan, which is Oregon's Medicaid program Employee fraud: Report fraud or waste by an ODHS employee or if suspect them of misusing financial resources or equipment Investigators coordinate with staff at the ODHS Field Offices, county prosecutors, and local, state, and federal law enforcement agencies when necessary. The Coordinator sends a report to the Investigations Unit for review, and substantiated criminal investigations results are thoroughly reviewed for prosecution referral. No information is reported back to the complaining party to preserve the confidentiality and privacy of client information. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 945-5608 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES ODHS FRAUD INVESTIGATIONS
